title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF BARRIO NALASIN IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF BATAC, PROVINCE OF ILOCOS NORTE, TO GENERAL ARTEMIO RICARTE.

chunks.text:
H. No. 11929 / 65 OG No. 23, 5823 (June 9, 1969)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 5287, June 15, 1968 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF BARRIO NALASIN IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF BATAC, PROVINCE OF ILOCOS NORTE, TO GENERAL ARTEMIO RICARTE.

Be it enacted by the Senate, and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of Barrio Nalasin in the Municipality of Batac, Province of Ilocos Norte, is hereby changed to General Artemio Ricarte.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 15, 1968.
